hook.text: ACADEMY COACH TONY WHELAN AWARDED AN MBE

beats.text: 34 YEARS DEVOTED TO DEVELOPING UNITED'S ACADEMY
97 ACADEMY GRADUATES MADE THEIR FIRST-TEAM DEBUT UNDER HIM
WHELAN SAYS HE IS PROFOUNDLY HONOURED BY THE AWARD

caption: One of the greatest servants this club has ever had 🔴 Tony Whelan has been awarded an MBE in the King's Birthday Honours. Thirty-four years at Carrington. 97 academy graduates making their first-team debut on his watch. Players like Welbeck, Lingard and Rashford all came through under Tone. He called the honour 'profound' — we call it long overdue. Who's your favourite Whelan academy product? Tell us below 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #mufcacademy #wonderkid
